name: Ramsey Credit Services
description_short: Ramsey Credit Services is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 3.8/5 with 20 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Ramsey Credit Services is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. Carrying a 3.8/5.0 Google rating from 20 reviews, Ramsey Credit Services has an solid reputation among consumers in the Atlanta area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Ramsey Credit Services specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Ramsey Credit Services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering Ramsey Credit Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
